channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Surging Rockets beat the Celtics after knocking off the Cavaliers twice
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Houston Rockets have been one of the NBA’s more surprising teams this season. After their past three games, they shouldn’t shock anyone.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Butler suspended for the 3rd time this month by the Miami Heat as trade deadline looms
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was back from suspension. Again. And then Butler got suspended by the Miami Heat. Again. Butler has been suspended for the third time this month by the Heat, this one starting basically just as the second one was ending.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell returns 1 week after giving birth to son
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee coach Kim Caldwell returned to the sideline a week after giving birth to a son and was greeted with a standing ovation from a crowd of 12,033 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Anthony Davis scores 42 points, grabs 23 rebounds as Lakers top Hornets 112-107 for 4th straight win
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Anthony Davis had 42 points and 23 rebounds, and the Los Angeles Lakers used a huge first quarter from the All-Star center to build a 23-point lead before beating the Charlotte Hornets 112-107 on Monday night for their fourth straight win.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl 2025: Time, channel, halftime show, how to watch Chiefs vs. Eagles livestream
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the ubiquitous Taylor Swift will be among the familiar faces for this year’s Super Bowl when the Kansas City Chiefs go for an unprecedented three-peat against the Philadelphia Eagles on Feb. 9 in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Australian Open champion Jannik Sinner's style draws comparisons to Novak Djokovic
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Of all the praise bestowed on Jannik Sinner after he won his second consecutive Australian Open championship, and third Grand Slam title overall, nothing felt as significant as the comparison made by runner-up Alexander Zverev.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kelsey Plum headed to Los Angeles and Jewell Loyd to Las Vegas in blockbuster 3-way deal: AP source
item.description: Kelsey Plum is headed to Los Angeles as part of a three-way trade that will send Jewell Loyd to the Las Vegas Aces, according to a person familiar with the deal. The Sparks traded the No. 2 pick in the draft and Li Yueru to Seattle. Los Angeles also received the No. 9 pick.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: Pete Carroll has a youthful energy that many people half his age don't possess, and the Raiders hope that enthusiasm — and, more importantly, his proven track record — translates to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Military heroes honored at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The Farmers Insurance Open is not just showcasing some of the world’s best golfers — it’s also paying tribute to the heroes of our nation, offering service members special access and recognition throughout the week.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5
